content: Confirm domain boundaries before writing: target files (trail-schema.md, orchestrator-role/SKILL.md, checker-role/SKILL.md, earned-constraints.md) all live under catalog/Platform/PMCR-O/skills/orchestrator/** and catalog/Platform/PMCR-O/skills/checker/**. Orchestrator/Checker are Platform role-skills, not one of the 10 C-Suite domains, so this does not cross Law 4 (another domain's SKILL.md). It is still a live, published Platform file per hil-gating.md precedent set in trail e5e3107f's own disposition text, hence routed through /ceo:approve-initiative rather than self-sealed.

Apply Diff 1 from proposed-dependency-resolver-hardening.md to references/trail-schema.md: add 00-deps.json to the directory layout diagram (between 00-frame.json in the listing, written before it per timing) and add a new '## 00-deps.json' section documenting its schema. Success condition: file contains a 00-deps.json section with the requested_by/needs/resolved/domain_scope_path/resolved_at fields, and the layout diagram lists it.

Apply Diff 2 to skills/orchestrator-role/SKILL.md step 1 ('Resolve dependencies'): append the sentence instructing orchestrator to write dependency-resolver's returned resolution to 00-deps.json at the trail root before creating 00-frame.json. Success condition: step 1's paragraph contains this instruction verbatim per the proposal.

Apply Diff 3 to checker/skills/checker-role/SKILL.md 'What To Check, In Order': insert 'Dependency-resolution-recorded' as new item 3 (after schema-conformance, before law-conformance), renumbering the former items 3-4 to 4-5. Success condition: four checks become five, in the order schema-conformance -> dependency-resolution-recorded -> law-conformance -> HIL-boundary conformance, with correct numerals.

Append proposed EC-010 verbatim to references/earned-constraints.md as a new entry, additive only -- no edits to existing EC-009 or EC-VERIFY-FIRST-001 text. Success condition: EC-010 block present at end of file, prior content byte-identical.

Explicitly out of scope for this cycle's Make step (per proposal's own 'What this does NOT do' / staging note): do not touch catalog/skills.json or either marketplace.json twin; do not fix the unrelated stale 'sibling pmcro-skills repo' strings in cto/skills/domain-scope/SKILL.md or ceo/commands/evolve-colony.md -- EC-010 documents that gap, it does not close it.
